user.title: Connect to Tuya Cloud
user.description:
Enter your Tuya IoT Platform credentials.

Get them from [iot.tuya.com](https://iot.tuya.com)

1. Create a Cloud Project
2. Enable 'Smart Lock Open Service' API
3. Link your Tuya/Smart Life app

select_device.title: Select Lock
select_device.description: Choose the lock you want to add to Home Assistant.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Client ID and Secret.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Tuya Cloud. Check your internet connection.
error.no_devices: No smart locks found. Make sure you linked your Tuya app and enabled Smart Lock API.
